name: theme-switcher
description: A three-state (light / dark / system) theme-preference control. Three variants: icon (compact toolbar of three icon-only toggle buttons), labeled (icon + text per option), icon-labeled (single cycling button). Persists the user's choice to localStorage and reflects it as data-theme on the configured root element (the single repoint mechanism the lievit token system uses). Server-rendered as a static HTML frame (no wire round-trip — the preference is a client-side fact); the colocated typed-TS enhancer reads localStorage on mount, syncs aria-pressed states, manages roving tabindex in the toolbar, applies data-theme to the root, and tracks prefers-color-scheme live when system is chosen. APG Toolbar + APG Toggle Button (aria-pressed) pattern. CSP-clean: zero inline script, zero on* handlers.
docs: Copies the theme-switcher partial to lievit/theme-switcher.jte and the colocated typed-TS enhancer to lievit/theme-switcher.enhancer.ts. Import the enhancer in your entry module and register it with the lievit runtime: registerEnhancer("theme-switcher", ThemeSwitcherEnhancer). The partial renders a display:none root (to avoid flash-of-wrong-state); the enhancer removes the guard synchronously on mount after syncing aria-pressed. Three variants via the `variant` param: icon (default, compact toolbar), labeled (icon + text), icon-labeled (single cycling button). Size via `size`: sm/md (default)/lg — height-based, toolbar-aligned. `storageKey` names the localStorage key (default lievit-theme); `rootSelector` names the element that gets data-theme (default html); `defaultTheme` is the fallback (default system). `showSystemOption=false` reduces to a two-state light/dark toggle. Labels are i18n-friendly: set labelLight/labelDark/labelSystem from the Spring controller's i18n layer. The enhancer applies data-theme, never toggles a class (ADR-0005 single repoint mechanism). Multiple instances on the same page are allowed; they stay in sync via the shared localStorage key.
